features: With the patented 24-hour fresh power technology for a long-lasting fresh feeling. Without aluminium
Fresh antiperspirant for men with a woody aromatic masculine fragrance
Developed with athletes for excellent anti-sweat effect against heavy sweating
Radiates passion and energy of the modern man
Top notes: kiwi, lavender, mandarin, yuzu, mint, grapefruit, anise, bergamot. Middle notes: sandalwood, patchouli, geranium. Base notes: tonka bean, musk, vanilla, pepper, ambergris
description: Adidas Sport Sensations Ice Dive deodorant body spray gives you the kick of extreme sports - designed for men who want to feel free. The fresh antiperspirant has a cooling and sweat-inhibiting effect thanks to the 24-hour fresh power technology. It is gentle on the skin and suitable for all skin types. The deodorant body spray protects against unpleasant body odours and prevents sweat production. It leaves a lasting feeling of freshness. The patented technology has been developed with athletes for excellent effect. The deodorant body spray contains 0% aluminium. The spicy fragrance contains accents of refreshing mint, elegant lavender and bergamot. The blend of aromatic geranium, woody sandalwood and patchouli transitions into the warm base notes of musk combined with intense ambergris and wood. This results in a dynamic, invigorating fragrance full of power and energy. adidas Sport Sensations Ice Dive Deodorant Body Spray is ideal for men who live fast, retreat from no challenge and want to enjoy every moment in its fullness. For daring spirits who are constantly on the move and discover new things.
